headline: Altria Reshapes Capital Return With AB InBev Sale And New Buyback Plan
summary: Altria Group (NYSE:MO) has sold a portion of its stake in Anheuser-Busch InBev, adjusting its exposure to the global brewer. The company has also approved a new US$2.4b stock repurchase plan, signaling a fresh phase of capital deployment. Altria remains primarily focused on the US tobacco market, while also holding investments in adjacent categories.
